creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 198128
py-automaton-1.14.0.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch that updates devel/py-automaton to 1.14.0 . This is the latest supported version for the OpenStack Queens release according to https://releases.openstack.org/queens/index.html#automaton .

Changes by upstream:
- http://git.openstack.org/cgit/openstack/automaton/log/?h=stable/queens

Changes to the port:
- added LICENSE_FILE
- sorted variables a bit according to the PHB
- rebased pkg-descr
- updated WWW

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (10.4-, 11.2-RELEASE, 12.0-ALPHA9 amd64 + i386) for each py27 + py36 flavor -> OK
- portlint -> OK
